name: Charlotte Pudding - OP08-067 (Reprint)
effect_text: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
